instruction: The cloud service system, cloudbed-1, experienced two failures within the time range of March 20, 2022, from 21:30 to 22:00. For each failure, the root cause component, the exact root cause occurrence time, and the underlying reason are currently unknown. You are tasked with identifying, for EACH failure, the root cause component, the root cause occurrence datetime, and the root cause reason.
groundtruth:
answer 1: component=cartservice-0; reason=container memory load; datetime=2022-03-20 21:30:16
answer 2: component=node-1; reason=node disk space consumption; datetime=2022-03-20 21:52:17
scoring_points:
The 1-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2022-03-20 21:30:16
The 1-th predicted root cause component is cartservice-0
The 2-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2022-03-20 21:52:17
The 2-th predicted root cause component is node-1
